creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
- do not directly depend on setuptools, use USE_DISTUTILS instead
- do not bump PORTREVISION because it had dependended on setuptools both derectly and via USE_PYDISTUTILS, so dependencies list isn't changed
- remove indefinite article in COMMENT
- move pkg-plist contents into Makefile:PLIST_FILES
- trim Makefile header
- limit python version to 2.x only

buildlog:
http://people.freebsd.org/~rm/trac-vote-0.1.2_2.log

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
